prompt: Minimalist commercial ad featuring an oversized Oreo cookie, ultra clean design. A young woman in an all white outfit sits against the giant cookie with one leg crossed, smiling while holding an Oreo biscuit. Soft gradient blue background with large bold white “OREO” text behind. Glossy reflective floor, soft studio lighting, luxury commercial photography. Small top right text “Designed by Mr Das”. Bottom center tagline in small white font: “Twist, lick, dunk."
